_metadata.title: SAP and HANA VM certification reference
_metadata.purpose: Machine-readable INDEX of SAP/HANA certified Azure VM families and SKUs, consumed by the sap-deployment-readiness skill. Derived from the authoritative, verbatim SAP Note in knowledge/sap-note-1928533.md (and the HANA Hardware Directory). The skill fetches this file live at runtime, so updating it via pull request takes effect immediately — no plugin re-install required.
_metadata.authoritative_source_in_repo: knowledge/sap-note-1928533.md (verbatim SAP Note 1928533). If this index and that note ever disagree, the note wins — reconcile this file to it.

sap_supported_vms.title: SAP Applications on Azure: Supported Products and Azure VM types
sap_supported_vms.access: Requires SAP support login (cannot be crawled as a web page by the agent)

hana_certified_vms.title: SAP HANA Hardware Directory — Certified IaaS Platforms

_metadata.how_to_update: When SAP publishes an updated Note 1928533 / 2235581 or HANA Hardware Directory: edit the arrays below to match the authoritative source, bump 'version' and 'last_updated', open a pull request, and merge. Agents that have Code Access to the repo (or skills that fetch this file's raw URL) pick up the new data on the next run.
_metadata.warning: This is a maintained snapshot for operational convenience. The SAP Notes above remain the authoritative source. Always verify against them before a production deployment decision.
